meaning: n.乌拉尔河,乌拉尔(苏联一地区)adj.乌拉尔山脉的
examples: Beyond the Ural Mountains stretches the West Siberian plain.
The Volga River and the Ural River discharge into the Caspian Sea.
Let's discover the way of extracting diamonds in the Russian region of Ural.
Yamantau in the Ural Mountains, upon which some 20, 000 workers continue to labor to this day.
Beginning in the Russian capital, trains trundle their way through birch forests across the Ural Mountains to the town of Yekaterinburg.
